remarks: Discover the epitome of timeless luxury in this magnificent Colonial Chateau-style residence. Perfectly situated on two flat, meticulously landscaped acres in a coveted walking neighborhood, this home offers unparalleled privacy while remaining just moments from town and top-rated schools. This quiet, no-cut-through street is a haven for outdoor enthusiasts, offering exceptional bike riding and walking routes right from your door. The active neighborhood association fosters a true sense of community-think spirited trick-or-treating, seasonal gatherings, and friendly faces at every turn. Enjoy the best of both worlds: peaceful residential living with convenient access to prime roadways for an easy commute.   The interior is a masterful blend of elegance and comfort, featuring six spacious en suite bedrooms and an astounding eight indoor fireplaces that create warmth and ambiance throughout. Designed for grand entertaining and modern family living, the home boasts multiple family rooms, ensuring ample space for every occasion. Indulge your passions in the dedicated wine cellar and the custom-designed sports den.  The sophisticated primary level flows seamlessly to the breathtaking exterior amenities, which include a built-in pool for summer relaxation and a beautiful outdoor fireplace for year-round enjoyment. Completing this exceptional estate are four spacious garage bays, providing abundant storage and convenience.
